nasb.text: The king reflected and said, ‘Is this not Babylon the great, which I myself have built as a royal residence by the might of my power and for the glory of my majesty?’

esv.text: and the king answered and said, “Is not this great Babylon, which I have built by my mighty power as a royal residence and for the glory of my majesty?”

cnv.text: 他說：“這大巴比倫城不是我用大能大力建造作我的京都，為顯我威嚴的榮耀嗎？”

ccb.text: 说：“这宏伟的巴比伦岂不是我用大能建立为京都，以显我的威严和荣耀吗？”
